title: lepidotis annotina
intro: Lepidotis annotina is a plant species, also known as Mountain Pleat Moss or Mountain Fringe Moss, that belongs to the family Lepidoziaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Lepidotis annotina include alleviating congestion, soothing coughs, and reducing inflammation in the airways. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
